name: Egg Drop Soup#4
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs and stir in water.
2. Mince the scallions.
3. Blend the cornstarch and remaining cold water until a paste is formed.
4. Bring the stock to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to medium and stir in sugar, salt, sherry, and soy sauce.
6. Add the cornstarch paste and cook, stirring continuously, until the soup thickens and becomes smooth.
7. Reduce heat to low.
8. Slowly pour the eggs into the soup while stirring constantly until they separate into shreds.
9. Turn off the heat.
10. Garnish with minced scallions. Serves 4-5.
